channel.title: Deep Dives on Systology
channel.description: Recent content in Deep Dives on Systology

item.title: AI/ML Workshop
item.description: Practical, reproducible ML examples (PyTorch/Hugging Face/NumPy) with MPS-aware benchmarks and experiment hygiene for local hardware.

item.title: Chowist
item.description: Monolithic Django app for place listings; focus on production hardening: static serving, background jobs, connection pooling, and CI/CD.

item.title: Grit
item.description: From‑scratch Git implementation in Rust focusing on object storage, performance, and plumbing/porcelain command compatibility.

item.title: Mailprune
item.description: Local-first email auditing and cleanup tool that identifies noisy senders and produces privacy-preserving recommendations.

item.title: Photohaul
item.description: Java tool for organizing and migrating large photo collections with deduplication, metadata preservation, and resumable jobs.

item.title: Ragchain
item.description: Local RAG stack (Chroma + Ollama) for private, reproducible retrieval and LLM usage; focuses on hybrid retrieval, index versioning, and evaluation.

item.title: Rustoku
item.description: Fast Sudoku solver and generator in Rust using bitmasking and MRV heuristics; emphasizes speed, determinism, and explainable solve traces.

item.title: Spark Trial
item.description: End-to-end ETL example using Apache Spark for parquet datasets; focuses on schema handling, partitioning, and reproducible aggregation.

item.title: Streaming Frameworks
item.description: Two approaches to streaming pipelines — Apache Beam’s portable unified model (Java/DirectRunner) vs. Apache Flink’s native API with stateful processing and fault tolerance.

item.title: Video Analysis
item.description: Two approaches to multimodal video feature extraction — Apple-native (Vision, AVFoundation, Core Image) vs. cross-platform C++/Python (OpenCV, pybind11) for ML preprocessing.

item.title: VirtuC
item.description: Rust-implemented compiler for a C subset that emits LLVM IR and focuses on AST design, semantic checks, and IR validation for teaching.
